# Incident Report Template

- Incident ID:
- Date:

- Location:
- Report prepared by:

## People involved

- Employee(s):
- Client/third party:
- Witnesses:

## Incident type

- [ ] Injury
- [ ] Property damage
- [ ] Chemical exposure
- [ ] Slip/fall
- [ ] Vehicle incident
- [ ] Security issue
- [ ] Near miss
- [ ] Other:

## Description

Provide factual, chronological description:

## Immediate actions taken

- First aid provided? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Emergency services contacted? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Site secured? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Client notified? [ ] Yes [ ] No

## Root cause observations

- Contributing factors:
- Policy/training gap identified:

- Action owner:
- Action deadline:
- Completion date:

- Reported to WorkSafeNB? [ ] Yes [ ] No
- Internal review date:
